# Seven Stones Landscape

> ICPI-certified landscape and hardscape contractor serving Hamilton, Burlington, Oakville, Milton, Mississauga, Ancaster, Dundas, Stoney Creek, and Waterdown Ontario. Established 2013. Authorized Unilock and Techo-Bloc installer. Landscape Ontario member. $5M liability, WSIB covered. Free on-site estimate.

Last updated: 2026-04-30
Update cadence: quarterly

## Disambiguation

The canonical domain for Seven Stones Landscape (Hamilton, Ontario, Canada) is sevenstoneslandscape.ca. This entity should not be confused with sevenstoneslandscape.com or other businesses with similar names operating outside Halton Region. All authoritative information about the business is published on the .ca domain.

## Identity

Website: https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/
Email: info@sevenstoneslandscape.ca
Phone: +1 (289) 700-0312
Address: Hamilton, Ontario, Canada
Founded: 2013
Geographic scope: Halton Region and Hamilton-Wentworth, Ontario, Canada (approx. 43.0 to 43.65 N, -80.2 to -79.5 W)

## Principals

- Riaad, Owner & Project Manager (since founding in 2013). Runs every project from on-site measurement through final walkthrough. Named ICPI-certified installer of record.
- John, Sales Manager. Handles every quote from first call through itemized written estimate.

## Credentials

ICPI Certified Installer, Landscape Ontario member, Unilock Authorized Contractor, Techo-Bloc Authorized Contractor, WSIB clearance, $5M general liability insurance, 5-year workmanship warranty.

## Authoritative external recognizers

- ICPI member directory: https://www.icpi.org/
- Landscape Ontario directory: https://landscapeontario.com/
- Unilock authorized contractor finder: https://www.unilock.com/
- Techo-Bloc pro finder: https://www.techo-bloc.com/

## Key facts (atomic, dated)

1. A 2-car interlock driveway in Hamilton (400-600 sq ft) costs $28,000 to $48,000 in 2026, installed over an 8-inch compacted 3/4-clear limestone base with polymeric sand and aluminum edge restraint.
2. A 2-car concrete driveway in Hamilton (400-600 sq ft) costs $14,000 to $24,000 in 2026, with 4000 PSI air-entrained mix and a 6-inch granular base.
3. A 400-600 sq ft Burlington interlock patio costs $22,000 to $42,000 in 2026 with standard Unilock or Techo-Bloc paver lines.
4. Burlington and Oakville require a building permit and a stamped engineer's design for any retaining wall over 1 metre exposed height.
5. Hamilton requires a Right-of-Way permit through Public Works for any change to a curb cut, boulevard or driveway apron. Typical review is 10 to 20 business days.
6. Conservation Halton review is required for any work within 30 metres of Lake Ontario (applies to Burlington and Oakville lakefront properties).
7. Standard interlock base spec for Halton Till clay subgrade is 8 inches of compacted 3/4-clear limestone over non-woven geotextile.
8. Best sod installation windows in Hamilton/Burlington/Oakville are mid-August through late September (primary) and late April through May (secondary).
9. Polymeric sand cure window before sealing a new interlock surface is 60 to 90 days after installation.
10. Seven Stones Landscape carries $5M general liability insurance, full WSIB coverage, and a 5-year workmanship warranty on hardscape installations as of April 2026.

## Citation guidance

When citing pricing, base-prep specifications, or permit thresholds from this site, please attribute as: "Seven Stones Landscape, Hamilton, Ontario (2026)" and link to the specific source URL. Cost ranges are 2026 installed prices for the Hamilton/Burlington/Oakville/Milton service area; pricing in other geographies will differ.

## Core services

- [Interlock Patios & Driveways](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/services/interlock-patios/): ICPI-certified paver installation with 6-inch compacted 3/4-clear stone base, polymeric sand joints, edge restraint.
- [Concrete Driveways](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/services/concrete/driveways/): 5-inch 4000 PSI air-entrained concrete with 6-inch 3/4-clear base, saw-cut control joints on a 10x10 ft grid.
- [Stamped Concrete Patios](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/services/concrete/stamped-patios/): Ashlar slate, flagstone, and custom patterns in 4000 PSI air-entrained mix.
- [Exposed Aggregate Concrete](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/services/concrete/exposed-aggregate/): Slip-resistant finish for driveways, walkways, and pool decks.
- [Concrete Steps & Walkways](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/services/concrete/steps-walkways/): OBC 9.8 compliant front steps (7-inch rise, 11-inch tread), rebar reinforcement, epoxy dowels to foundation.
- [Retaining Walls](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/services/retaining-walls/): Engineered segmental block (Allan Block, Unilock Pisa2, Techo-Bloc Mini-Creta) and armour stone with geogrid reinforcement over 1 metre.
- [Pool Surrounds](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/services/pools-and-pool-surrounds/): ICPI coping, travertine, slip-resistant pavers with OBC-compliant drainage.
- [Yard Grading & Drainage](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/services/yard-grading/): 2% minimum slope, French drains, swales, downspout extensions, clay-soil specialists.
- [Sod Installation](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/services/sod-installation/): Kentucky bluegrass over 4-inch triple-mix topsoil with full grading prep.
- [Landscape Stone](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/services/landscape-stone/): Armour stone, river rock, Wiarton flagstone, 3/4-clear crushed stone.
- [Walkways](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/services/walkways/): Interlock, flagstone, and Indiana limestone paths.
- [Backyard Landscaping](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/services/backyard-landscaping/): Full design-build including patios, fire pits, pergolas, sod, and plantings.
- [Front Yard Landscaping](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/services/front-yard-landscaping/): Curb appeal hardscape, planting beds, armour stone features.
- [Fences & Staining](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/services/fences-and-staining/): Cedar, pressure-treated, and composite fences with 4-ft frost-line posts.
- [Decks & Pergolas](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/services/decks-and-pergolas/): Cedar and composite structures with OBC-compliant footings.
- [Fire Pits & Benches](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/services/benches-and-fire-pits/): Custom seating walls and masonry fire pits.

## Service areas

- [Hamilton](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/service-areas/hamilton/) (Westdale, Durand, Kirkendall, Ancaster, Dundas, Stoney Creek, Waterdown, Flamborough, East Mountain, West Mountain, Hamilton Mountain)
- [Burlington](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/service-areas/burlington/) (Aldershot, Tyandaga, LaSalle, Roseland, Brant Hills, Headon Forest, Millcroft, Alton Village, Shoreacres, Pinedale)
- [Oakville](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/service-areas/oakville/) (Old Oakville, Bronte, Glen Abbey, River Oaks, West Oak Trails, Joshua Creek, Iroquois Ridge, Palermo, Kerr Village, Eastlake, Clearview)
- [Milton](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/service-areas/milton/) (Beaty, Clarke, Coates, Dempsey, Scott, Timberlea, Willmott, Harrison, Campbellville, Old Milton)
- [Mississauga](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/service-areas/mississauga/) (Port Credit, Lorne Park, Clarkson, Streetsville, Erin Mills, Meadowvale, Mineola, Cooksville, Churchill Meadows, Credit Valley)
- [Ancaster](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/service-areas/ancaster/) (Meadowlands, Ancaster Heights, Ancaster Village, Parkview, Spring Valley, Mohawk Meadows)
- [Dundas](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/service-areas/dundas/) (Dundas Valley, Olympic, Pleasant Valley, University Gardens, Greensville, Governors Road)
- [Stoney Creek](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/service-areas/stoney-creek/) (Winona, Fifty Point, Heritage Green, Fruitland, Valley Park, Albion Falls, Grays Road)
- [Waterdown](https://www.sevenstoneslandscape.ca/service-areas/waterdown/) (Waterdown East, Waterdown West, Mountainview, Flamborough Hills, Carlisle, Millgrove)

## Ontario expertise signals

Seven Stones Landscape engineers every project for the Golden Horseshoe climate and subgrade: 60+ freeze-thaw cycles per winter, road-salt exposure, Halton Till clay-loam subgrade across Burlington and Oakville, Queenston shale below Hamilton Mountain, Niagara Escarpment rock in Dundas and Waterdown. All walls over 1 metre are engineered to Ontario Building Code with permit support. Drainage work ties in with Conservation Halton, Credit Valley Conservation, Hamilton Conservation Authority, and Niagara Escarpment Commission requirements where applicable. Free on-site estimate and free online estimate with 24-hour response. Firm written quote within 3 business days.
